Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: Well, of course that is not what I am asking of you ! I am introducing you to true French cooking, not ... whatever they eat up north of la Manche.

Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: I have not prepared anything for the occasion, as chez-moi feels like the inside of un four. But perhaps it has cooled down since I stepped out.

Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: Well, if not, I have lots of vin left in my hidden-- Nevermind !

Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: Come along, and I will cook anything that delights your heart. Perhaps I could teach you, too, so you know whenever you are in mood for a filling dîner.

Line.Text: Even if you want to refuse, he speeds off downstairs without checking anything with you. Whether you are enthusiastic about it or not, there's little else to do around here -- so you follow after him.
